headline: KKR (KKR) Valuation Check After Q1 2026 Earnings Rebound Buyback Expansion And Dividend Announcement
summary: KKR (KKR) drew fresh attention after first quarter 2026 results showed net income of US$405.23 million versus a net loss a year earlier, along with a higher buyback authorization and a declared quarterly dividend. See our latest analysis for KKR. The Q1 rebound, larger buyback authorization and dividend decision come after a mixed price pattern, with a 10.57% 1 month share price return but a 22.16% year to date share price decline.
